use_cases: Security dashboard displaying blocked fraudulent emails with animated threat alerts
Admin panel interface for email filtering systems and threat management
SaaS platform security monitoring showing real-time fraud detection results
Email service provider admin interface for viewing blocked threats
IT admin dashboard for enterprise email security management
ai_summary: A fraud detection card component that displays a list of blocked emails with smooth animated reveal effects triggered by hover and click interactions. Features staggered motion animations with blur transitions, opacity changes, and a rotating loading indicator. Built with framer-motion for professional-grade animations. Designed primarily for security dashboards, admin panels, and SaaS platforms requiring email threat monitoring and fraud detection interfaces.
